# XCSourceTextPosition

**Structure**

A zero-based position in a source editor, defined by a line number and column number.

## Declaration

```swift
struct XCSourceTextPosition
```

## Creating Source Text Positions

- **init()**: Creates a new source text position at the beginning of the source text.
- **init(line:column:)**: Creates a source text position at the specified line and column.

## Inspecting Source Text Positions

- **column**: The horizontal component of a source text position.
- **line**: The vertical component of a source text position.

## Source Text

- **XCSourceTextBuffer**: A buffer you use to access and modify the text contents and text selections in a source editor.
- **XCSourceTextRange**: A half-open range of text in a buffer you use to select text or specify the insertion point for new text.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Sendable
